name: Jiaqi Yin
title: Undergraduate Researcher
bio: I am an undergraduate student majoring in Artificial Intelligence at [Harbin Institute of Technology](https://www.hit.edu.cn/). My research interests include embodied intelligence and robotics.

I am currently a visiting research student at [Zhongguancun Academy](https://www.bza.edu.cn/), supervised by [Prof. Ce Hao](https://cehao1.github.io/). During my gap year, I was a visiting student at [SSR Group, Tsinghua SIGS](https://ssr-group.net/) (supervised by [Prof. Wenbo Ding](https://ssr-group.net/)) and [X-Institute](https://www.x-institute.edu.cn/) (supervised by [Prof. Wenzeng Zhang](https://www.researchgate.net/profile/Wenzeng-Zhang)) in Shenzhen.
I am actively seeking PhD opportunities starting Fall 2027. If you think I could be a good fit for your group, please feel free to [reach out](#contact)!

news.content: Won 1st Place at the [2025 ASME Student Mechanism & Robot Design Competition](https://sites.google.com/site/asmemrc/design-competition-showcase) (Undergraduate Category).
Visiting student at [SSR Group, Tsinghua SIGS](https://ssr-group.net/).

opensource.title: Octo UR5: Real-World Deployment of Octo on Universal Robots
opensource.description: A complete open-source pipeline for deploying the Octo embodied intelligence model on UR5/UR3 robots — simulation, teleoperation, data collection, finetuning, and distributed inference.
